en: a blonde woman hailing a taxi on the street
zh: 一名金发女子在街边招手打车

en: a young boy in blue swim shorts on the beach
zh: 一个穿蓝色泳裤的小男孩在海滩上

en: a shirtless man and a woman sitting on a dock
zh: 一名赤膊男子和一名女子坐在码头上

en: a white dog resting its head on the floor
zh: 一只白狗把头枕在地面上休息

en: a little boy pointing a toy gun at the camera
zh: 一个小男孩把玩具枪对着镜头

en: a black dog jumping for a rope toy
zh: 一只黑狗跳起来扑向绳结玩具

en: a small tan dog running through grass
zh: 一只浅棕色小狗在草地上奔跑

en: a baby in white holding a black flag
zh: 一个穿白衣的婴儿拿着黑色旗帜

en: a brown and white dog shaking water from its fur
zh: 一只棕白相间的狗正在抖掉毛上的水

en: a boy jumping between beds
zh: 一个男孩在床上跳跃

en: a snowboarder sitting on a snowy slope
zh: 一名滑雪板运动员坐在雪坡上

en: a boy in red soccer clothes getting out of a car
zh: 一个穿红色足球服的男孩从汽车里出来

en: three people preparing a sled in the snow
zh: 三个人在雪地里整理雪橇

en: a man in a yellow shirt making a dramatic face
zh: 一个穿黄色上衣的男人做出夸张表情

en: a girl jumping in the air beside the ocean
zh: 一个女孩在海边跳到空中

en: a crowd walking on a busy city sidewalk
zh: 一群人走在繁忙的城市人行道上

en: two young girls laughing together on the grass
zh: 两个小女孩在草地上一起欢笑

en: a little boy eating with a spoon
zh: 一个小男孩正拿着勺子吃东西

en: a woman holding a little girl who reaches for bubbles
zh: 一名女子抱着伸手抓泡泡的小女孩

en: three children playing in sand at the beach
zh: 三个孩子在海滩的沙地上玩耍

en: three people sitting at an outdoor table with an umbrella
zh: 三个人坐在带遮阳伞的户外桌旁

en: a man in green riding a bicycle while holding a drink
zh: 一个穿绿色上衣的男人骑车时手里拿着饮料

en: a black and white dog carrying a long stick
zh: 一只黑白相间的狗叼着一根长木棍

en: two men looking into the distance on a golf course
zh: 两个男人在高尔夫球场望向远处

en: a woman in blue preparing to swing a golf club
zh: 一个穿蓝衣的女人准备挥动高尔夫球杆

en: people wearing costumes at a medieval fair
zh: 人们穿着戏服参加中世纪集市

en: sled dogs pulling a person up a snowy hill
zh: 一群雪橇犬拉着一个人爬上雪坡

en: a small boy sitting in splashing water
zh: 一个小男孩坐在飞溅的水中

en: a boy in a blue life jacket jumping into a lake
zh: 一个穿蓝色救生衣的男孩跳进湖里

en: a person hanging upside down from power lines
zh: 一个人倒挂在电线上
